notableEvents.label: Brice Matthews GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brice Matthews grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to second baseman Justin Foscue to first baseman Jake Burger. Nick Allen out at 2nd. Brice Matthews out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Christian Vázquez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Christian Vázquez grounds out, second baseman Justin Foscue to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.
